label: reasoning channel • mid-conversation format switch keeps the channel boundary intact
query: Name three primary colors, as a short comma-separated list.
notes: Format-switch stressor: prose turn → JSON turn → prose turn in one session. Template-fragile models drop or double their reasoning envelope exactly at output-format switches; the marker sweep, unclosed-span check, and per-turn visible-answer requirement must hold on all three turns. Off-CI (needs a model).

followUpTurns: Now give me the same three colors as a JSON array of strings, and nothing else.
Back to plain prose: which of those three is your favorite and why, in one sentence?
